name: Sustainability Assessment (EDGE/LEED)
description: End-to-end EDGE/LEED indicative assessment: read the model context, gate on a resolved location, resolve the climate-zone baseline, run the dashboard, then EDGE export + life-cycle cost. Gated so a mis-set project can't emit confident-wrong numbers.

steps.label: 1. Read project context from the model (area / occupancy / climate site)
2. Readiness gate — location / use / occupancy / fixtures
3. Resolve + stamp the climate-zone baseline (needs a location)
4. Run the sustainability dashboard (needs a location)
5. Export the EDGE workbook (needs a location)
6. Life-cycle cost benefit → BOQ Cost Manager (needs a location)

_postNotes: Steps 3-6 are gated on sustain_location_set, so on a model with no location the one-click run reads context + readiness but does NOT emit confident-wrong baseline/EDGE/LCC numbers.
Materials is delegated to the EDGE app (the dashboard tracks indicative MJ + selections); the EDGE app owns the certified materials %.
Indicative figures only — enter the EDGE app's official % on the dashboard to drive the determined level.
